claims.text: Sleep — Endurance Athlete Guide General sleep science for endurance athletes.
Personal sleep logs and individual protocols live in the personal wiki.
--- ## Why endurance athletes sleep differently on rest days Endurance athletes commonly report worse sleep quality on rest days than on training days.
The mechanism is well understood: - Adenosine buildup — physical activity accelerates adenosine accumulation in the brain.
